steps.title: Match delicate and durable
steps.content: The underlined claim says Echelman's sculptures look delicate but are actually durable. The best supporting quotation must address both the light, flexible appearance and the physical strength that explains durability.

steps.title: Reject unrelated evidence
steps.content: A and B discuss design tools and planning rather than durability, and D discusses local inspiration rather than material strength. A quotation saying the materials are flexible and strong directly supports both sides of the claim. The answer is C.
